stemHtml: What is a possible consequence of smoking?

options.a: Substances contained in cigarette smoke can reduce the production of gastric acid and promote gastrointestinal infections.
options.b: The cardiovascular system may be unable to take up enough oxygen, which in turn can cause hypoxia.
options.c: Regular smoking may interfere with the correct sensation of hunger, leading to obesity.
options.d: The tissues of the body can become used to higher levels of oxygen, which may result in Hyperventilation.
